prompt: hey so i've been working on this branch (DE-4521/add-user-engagement-model) for the past 2 days and I think it's finally ready. I've got like 8 commits but some of them are just 'fix tests' and 'wip' stuff. Can you help me get this ready for review? The main changes are a new dbt model called user_engagement that aggregates firebase events.

assertions.name: PR title matches regex format
assertions.description: The generated PR title must match the required format

assertions.name: PR title includes correct ticket ID
Commit cleanup guidance provided
assertions.description: Should provide specific guidance on squashing messy commits

assertions.name: #data-review message generated
assertions.description: Should generate Slack message with [REVIEW] prefix

assertions.name: PR description includes summary
assertions.description: PR description should have a summary section
